# FuncSilo

> A free, browser-based asset optimization workbench from the FuncLexa ecosystem.
> Convert SVGs to React JSX components, compress web assets, and manage design
> tokens — all in one place.

FuncSilo is a developer tool for turning raw design assets into production-ready
code and lean files. Drop in an SVG and get a clean React JSX component out;
run images and other assets through compression before shipping; keep design
tokens organized in one workbench instead of scattered config files.

## Key capabilities
- Convert SVG files into React JSX components
- Compress images and other web assets for production
- Manage and centralize design tokens
- Fast, unified workbench for asset/vector workflows

## Links
- Product: https://funcsilo.funclexa.dev/
- Ecosystem: https://funclexa.dev/

## Pricing
Free to use.
